name: axonize-desktop
description: Axonize semantic document operating system desktop app
author: Axonize Contributors

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:static
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --headed
